server/tests/test_raster.py :: test_clone_is_independent
def test_clone_is_independent() -> None:
    raster = solid_raster(4, 4, 10, 20, 30)
    clone = raster.clone()
    clone.data[0] = 99
    assert raster.data[0] == 10

server/tests/test_raster.py :: test_rgb_passthrough
def test_rgb_passthrough() -> None:
    raster = solid_raster(2, 2, 1, 2, 3)
    rgb = raster.to_rgb()
    assert rgb.channels == 3
    assert rgb.data == raster.data

server/tests/test_raster.py :: test_rgba_composites_on_white
def test_rgba_composites_on_white() -> None:
    raster = rgba_checkerboard(16, 16, cell=4)
    rgb = raster.to_rgb()
    assert rgb.channels == 3
    assert len(rgb.data) == 16 * 16 * 3
